ns0:entry.ns0:title: kata-containers/kata-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers
Language: rust
Kata Containers is an open source project and community working to build a standard implementation of lightweight Virtual Machines (VMs) that feel and perform like containers, but provide the workload isolation and security advantages of VMs. https://katacontainers.io/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kitao/pyxel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kitao/pyxel
Language: rust
A retro game engine for Python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lance-format/lance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lance-format/lance
Language: rust
Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lbjlaq/Antigravity-Manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lbjlaq/Antigravity-Manager
Language: rust
Professional Antigravity Account Manager & Switcher. One-click seamless account switching for Antigravity Tools. Built with Tauri v2 + React (Rust).专业的 Antigravity 账号管理与切换工具。为 Antigravity 提供一键无缝账号切换功能。

Language: rust
Main repository for the Linera protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memvid/memvid
Language: rust
Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-term memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustdesk/rustdesk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustdesk/rustdesk
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruvector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruvector
Language: rust
RuVector is a high performance vector and graph database built in Rust for AI, agentic systems, and real time analytics. It combines HNSW search, dynamic minimum cut coherence, graph intelligence, and self learning memory into one unified engine for scalable, low latency reasoning and structured retrieval.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stalwartlabs/stalwart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stalwartlabs/stalwart
Language: rust
All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).
